St. Lucie County FHA Loans

FHA loans in St. Lucie County, Florida

FHA loans across St. Lucie County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why the Treasure Coast is booming for FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

St. Lucie County Home Loans

FHA loans in St. Lucie County, Florida

St. Lucie County is one of the Treasure Coast's fastest-growing and most affordable markets, anchored by Port St. Lucie — one of Florida's largest and most new-construction-heavy cities — along with historic Fort Pierce. That combination of low prices and abundant new homes makes it an outstanding FHA market, where the loan limit covers homes with room to spare.

St. Lucie County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in St. Lucie County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a St. Lucie County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In St. Lucie's affordable, fast-growing market, that covers the vast majority of homes, including extensive new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm St. Lucie County's exact figure with HUD.

Treasure Coast growth and new construction

Port St. Lucie's master-planned communities — including the Tradition area — are tailor-made for FHA, with modern homes priced within the loan limit, perfect for first-time buyers. The county offers genuine value within reach of South Florida jobs. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds, and get pre-approved before you compete for homes.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across St. Lucie County

We help FHA buyers throughout St. Lucie County, including Port St. Lucie, Fort Pierce, and the Tradition area. For a closer look at the local market, loan limits, and down payment help, explore our city guide(s):

Port St. Lucie

Down payment help in St. Lucie County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and St. Lucie County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and St. Lucie County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in St. Lucie County for 2026?+
St. Lucie County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is St. Lucie County good for FHA buyers?+
Very — affordable prices and abundant new construction in Port St. Lucie make it one of the Treasure Coast's best FHA markets.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Port St. Lucie?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in St. Lucie County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of St. Lucie County?+
Yes — Port St. Lucie, Fort Pierce, the Tradition area, and every community in the county.
